calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-06-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-06-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Stipulation for entry of judgment and judgment on the record.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Thomas Ray, Esq. Special appearance for the Plaintiff: Asset Acceptance, LLC.

Defendant Hoang H. Pham present in pro per, was sworn and direct examined.
Case settled per stipulation for an entry of Judgment as follows:

Damages - $3166.00
Prejudgment Interest - $842.40
Attorney Fees - $791.65
Costs - $337.00
Sanctions - $290.00
Total - $5427.65
Judgment was submitted and signed in open court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Declare Requests For Admissions Deemed Admitted And Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-13-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE, LLC'S Motion To Declare Requests For Admissions Deemed Admitted And for Monetary Sanctions ($290.00) IS Granted. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =302/HEK

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2011 Set For Trial On Feb-06-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
